Header file for retrieving metadata information of the menu app in Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `menu_app_get_info` that returns a pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` structure. The function is likely used to retrieve metadata information about a menu application process. The inclusion of the `pebble_process_md.h` header file suggests that the `PebbleProcessMd` structure is defined elsewhere and is part of a broader process management system. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of process metadata retrieval.
